text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're all busy preparing for our<n>promotion
concert. Light Hello pulls<n>more than her weight,
making<n>arrangements and handling all sorts<n>of
paperwork.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, our impromptu concert<n>fails to draw
a single spectator. A<n>dejected Hello casts all the
blame on<n>herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon tries to lighten the mood,<n>saying
she'll definitely capture hearts<n>at her next
performance, but Hello still<n>seems down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over coffee, she confesses that she<n>never had
much concert experience<n>herself, and therefore,
doesn't know<n>what makes a concert successful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Agnes Tachyon sees<n>one of our
flyers and shows interest<n>in the project. She
announces that<n>she'll be at our next concert—with
a<n>guest in tow.
